title: Looking to Enhance our Monday.com Deployment
excerpt:
We have been using Monday.com for over a year now and have about 60 users in various departments using a variety of boards that we get updates from Zapier and Salesforce on. 
Where we are now needing some help is that di…

posts.author: Tim.east (Tim East)
posts.cookedHtml:
We have been using Monday.com for over a year now and have about 60 users in various departments using a variety of boards that we get updates from Zapier and Salesforce on.

Where we are now needing some help is that different teams have their own boards and they often relate to the same projects but with each team having their own need different information but the core details we want to keep in sync across all boards and updates to the common fields can get mapped across all boards.

We have tired a few approaches but fell there must be a better way with some expert help,

Main team based in UK hours

cheers

Tim

posts.author: Ricky.Tomer (Ricky Tomer)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey there @Tim.east and thanks for bringing this to the monday.com community!

I would be happy to see how the team at CarbonWeb might be able to assist you in optimizing your environment. Our team takes a component-by-component approach to our solutions and would be happy to provide you with an initial consultation. Our team is located in US and can be flexible with our availability. If you’d like to schedule a time with me please do so here: Consultation - Ricky

Good luck as you move forward!

Best regards,

Ricky Tomer

VP of Sales
Carbon Web Print, LLC
Schedule Consultation | Website
Phone: 440-462-7743 | Email : ricky@carbonweb.co

posts.author: ElenaK (Elena Korolkova (Kick Consulting))
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @Tim.east

Welcome to the community!

Let me introduce myself. My name is Elena and I’m the founder of Kick Consulting. I’ve worked with Monday.com for over 4 years and have a team of 14 now working along side of me (Project/change managers, Implementation managers, developers). I have a truly global team so we can accomodate a client in any time zone.

We offer a complimentary 1-hour initial meeting to discuss your pinpoints, needs, possible steps forward and options. You can book a session through this link Calendly - Kick Consulting

If you are unable to find suitable time, please let me know and i will contact you with more availability.

I look forward to hearing from you.

Elena
CEO and Founder
Kick Consulting

posts.author: peta (Peta Bolger)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @Tim.east

I hope you’re doing well. I was based in the UK myself for 10 years but have hopped back across to Melbourne again haha. We can certainly assist you at upstream and would be very happy to help.

We have dedicated teams including Solutions Engineers and a full stack Dev Team that specialises in integrations. We’re also Platinum Partners, APAC Partner of the Year for 2020 and a monday.com Preferred Partner so a safe and knowledgeable pair of hands.

Feel free to drop me an email via peta@upstreamtech.io or book an informal chat/discovery meeting with me here if preferred. No obligations, of course.

Kind regards,
Peta - upstream

posts.author: DamcoSolutions ( Neelam Bhatt)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @Tim.east ,

Welcome to the monday community.

Definitely, there are better ways out there and with expert help, you can easily sync all the core details of different teams you need across all boards. I would suggest you seek an end-to-end consultation from monday.com experts to enhance your monday deployment and make the most of this Work OS.
